scripts.test: npm run test:google-workspace && npm run test:google-account-admin && npm run test:auth && npm run test:master-login && npm run test:ai && npm run test:evaluation-workbench && npm run test:ai-competency && npm run test:compensation && npm run test:notifications && npm run test:ops && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:navigation && npm run test:performance-calendar && npm run test:performance-design && npm run test:leadership-insight && npm run test:goal-alignment && npm run test:kpi-clone && npm run test:evaluation-display && npm run test:pwa && npm run test:interactions && npm run test:feedback360 && npm run test:calibration-ops && npm run test:goal-governance && npm run test:wordcloud360 && npm run test:operational-pages
scripts.test:google-account-admin: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/google-account-management.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/department-delete.test.ts
scripts.test:interactions: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/interaction-integrity.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/personal-kpi-workspace.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/monthly-kpi-workspace.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/evaluation-results-workspace.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/evaluation-appeal-workspace.test.ts
scripts.test:evaluation-workbench: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/evaluation-writing-guide.test.ts && ts-node -r ./tests/register-path-aliases.ts -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/evaluation-workbench-loader.test.ts
scripts.test:feedback360: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-360-foundation.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-360-access.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-anytime-review.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-manager-effectiveness.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-skill-architecture.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-rating-guide.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/idp-copilot.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-360-report-analysis.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-360-ops.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/feedback-360-results-pdf.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/onboarding-review-workflow.test.ts
scripts.test:wordcloud360: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/word-cloud-360.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/word-cloud-360-import.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/word-cloud-360-ops.test.ts
scripts.test:operational-pages: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/operational-pages.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/protected-page-regression.test.ts
scripts.test:auth: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/auth-rbac.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/google-auth-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:master-login: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/master-login.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/master-login-permission-service.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/impersonation-risk.test.ts
scripts.test:ai: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/ai.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/evaluation-ai-assist.test.ts
scripts.test:ai-competency: ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/ai-competency.test.ts && ts-node -P tsconfig.seed.json tests/ai-competency-page.test.ts
